name: Circle of Care - 08 - Web Pipeline (NDA-Intake-Payment Webhook)

nodes.name: Intake Webhook (raw body, static path)
nodes.notes: Static, user-defined path (Part D) -- never an auto-generated UUID, survives re-imports. rawBody:true -- JSON.parse happens explicitly downstream, inside our own try/catch, never n8n's implicit parser.

nodes.name: Respond 200 OK
nodes.notes: Decoupling law: 200 returns immediately after validation passes. Everything heavy -- PDF generation, correction-queue copy, downstream processing -- forks to background from here.
